items.title: Canadian PM Mark Carney inches closer to majority, as fourth MP defects to Liberals
items.dek: Lori Idlout, formerly of the NDP, has become the latest lawmaker in the current parliament to cross the floor.
items.body: Lori Idlout, formerly of the NDP, has become the latest lawmaker in the current parliament to cross the floor.
